overview: Aflino Search Engine is a production-grade search engine on the Internet Computer with an algorithm-based ranking system, monetization engine, and AdSync billing platform. Features include CPC advertising, publisher earnings, auto-payout, tax tracking, and invoice management.
features: Algorithm-based search ranking with CTR, SEO, spam detection, and intent-aware scoring
AdSync billing system with CPC model and configurable publisher revenue share
Advertiser wallet with balance management and Razorpay payment integration
Publisher earnings with auto-payout at ₹500 threshold (KYC verified)
Transaction log, tax profiles, and invoice generation for financial compliance
Fraud protection: self-click prevention and IP-based rate limiting
Admin panel with monetization controls, KYC approval, and payout management
Discover feed with trending, recommended, recently indexed, and popular domains
